description: A Japanese martial art emphasizing powerful strikes, precise blocks, and disciplined form. Develops full-body coordination, explosive speed, and mental focus through solo kata practice and partner drills.

movements.name: Roundhouse Kick
movements.description: A powerful circular kick delivered with the instep or shin. The kicking leg rotates around the hip while the supporting foot pivots to generate full-body power through the target.

movements.name: Front Kick
movements.description: A straight thrust kick targeting the midsection or chin. The knee chambers high before the lower leg snaps outward, striking with the ball of the foot.

commonMistakes.description: Leaning back too far, reducing power transfer

movements.name: Side Block
movements.description: An outward forearm sweep that redirects an incoming strike to the outside line. The blocking arm rotates from the centreline while the other hand retracts to the hip.

commonMistakes.description: Using arm strength alone instead of rotating the torso
